    */*: Sync hostapd* and wpa_supplicant* with base ce276fe26d92010776

    Use IFM_IEEE80211_ADHOC for now on FreeBSD for IBSS operation.

    Base commit by adrian@ on Nov 26, 2015.

    This commit syncs ports with base.
